title: pelargonium × drakeae
intro: Pelargonium × drakeae, also known as Cape Geranium or Drake's Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Pelargonium genus, typically characterized by its fragrant leaves and showy flowers. The plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × drakeae include its ability to alleviate symptoms of the common cold, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations involving this plant often include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
